/CAL: SENTENCING/X:THE DEFENDANT HAVING ENTERED A HARVEY WAIVER AS TO COUNT 1 ORDERED AS FOLLOWS: STAY AWAY ORDER AS TO GUENEVERE BLANCHARD/TWS/CH2:ISS:CPROB:PROB 5 Y:PJ 17D/CTS: 17/4019HALF/CTORD:  DEFT SHALL NOT WORK ASA STREET PEFORMER UNLESS ABIDING BY THE LOCAL PERMITTING & LICENSING RESTRICTIONS/SA1: GUENEVERE  BLANCHARD, 150 YARDS/SA2: FISHERMAN'S WHARF AREA BOUNDED BY VAN NESS AVE TO WEST FRANCISCO ST TO THE SOUTH BORDERED BY THE BAY ON THE EAST & NORTH IN SF AND THE UNION SQUARE AREA BORDERED BY TAYLOR STTO THE WEST, KEARNEY ST TO THE EAST, BUSH STTO THE NORTH, & MARKET STREETTO THE SOUTH IN SF, DEFT MUST ALSO STAY AWAY FROM ALL OF THE EMBARCADERO INCLUDING ALL PIERS IN SF/SAORD/VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/BE/

/CAL  DISPOSITION/X  AS PART OF A NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION, THE PEOPLE MOVETO DISMISS COUNTS 1 PURSUANT TO PC 1385,/MO GRTD/DEF: ENTERS A HARVEY WAIVER, /X:THE DEFENDANT HAVING ENTERED A HARVEY WAIVER AS TO COUNT 1 ORDERED AS FOLLOWS: STAY AWAY ORDER AS TO GUENEVERE BLANCHARD/X:STAY AWAY ORDER ASTO GUENEVERE BLANCHARD FROM DISMISSED CHARGES MAY BE ADDED AS TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE SENTENCE IN COUNTS X,/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PER WVS CONST & CITZRTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS: 2/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/DISM3/
